info.title: LeadSuccess API
info.description:
The LeadSuccess API provides access to data structures and procedures on server-side via a RESTful API. It enables 3rd party developers to build customized frontend apps to the LeadSuccess System. The API is based on a subset of the OData 2.0 protocol.

**Authentication:** HTTPS Basic Authentication is required for every request.

**Base URL:** `https://<server-name>/<api-name>`

**Notes:**
- All parameter data must be transferred in JSON format.
- All text data is UTF-8 encoded.
- All date-time data is in UTC timezone.
- OData request syntax is case sensitive.
- Maximum result size per request is 100 rows. Use `$skiptoken` for pagination.
- A user can only keep one transaction active at a time.

server-name.description: Server name provided by convey upon login

api-name.description: API name provided by convey upon login

tags.name: Static Master Data
tags.description: Static data loaded once after app installation

tags.name: Visitor Data
tags.description: Contact and lead data collected at events

tags.name: Procedures
tags.description: Server-side procedures for barcode and business card recognition

get.description: Returns the full OData schema metadata for all available views and relations.
Returns all supported languages. Use `LanguageSpecExtID` as `LanguageSpecID` in other filtered views.
Returns language-specific entries for a language select control. Filter by `LanguageSpecID`.
Returns language-specific country entries for a country select control. Filter by `LanguageSpecID`.
Returns language-specific entries for a form-of-address select control. Filter by `LanguageSpecID`.
Returns language-specific entries for a user presence select control. Filter by `LanguageSpecID`.

get.summary: Get event option type select options (translated)
get.description: Returns language-specific entries for available event option types. Filter by `LanguageSpecID`.
Returns information about the current event including name, dates, exhibitor address and privacy policy.
Returns available options for the current event.
Returns user-related information useful for the start page of the app, including contact count and message flags.
Returns a list of fields that are mandatory for contact data entry for the current event.

get.summary: Get questionnaire questions and answer options for a contact
get.description: Returns the list of questions and answer options for the questionnaire related to a specific contact. Use filter: `$filter=(ContactID eq <id>)&$orderby=(SortIndex)`

200.description: Questionnaire lines with questions and answers

get.description: Retrieves current user information including presence status and messages.

put.description: Updates user information such as presence status, personal data and messages.

parameters.name: UserInfoID
parameters.description: Primary key of the user info record (1:1 reference to EmployeeID)

get.description: Retrieves the profile image of the current user as base64 encoded data.

post.description: Inserts a new profile image for the current user.

get.description: Returns a list of visitor contacts for the current user. Maximum 100 rows per request; use `$skiptoken` for pagination.

__next.description: URL for next result page (replace server path as described)

post.description: Inserts a new empty contact. You must insert an empty contact first before inserting barcode or business card data related to that contact. The server will fill additional columns automatically. Remember the returned `ContactID` for subsequent operations.

201.description: Contact created successfully. Returns the new contact record including the generated ContactID.

get.summary: Get a single visitor contact by ID

post.summary: Submit 1D barcode for contact data recognition
post.description: Insert a new entry to recognize contact data from a 1-dimensional barcode. Requires an existing contact to be inserted first (via `LSA_Contact`). Then call `PRC_GetRecognizedContact` to retrieve the processed data.

post.summary: Submit business card or 2D/QR code for recognition
post.description: Insert a new entry to recognize contact data from a business card image or scanned 2D/QR code. For business card images, also insert the image into `LSA_DOC1ImportCardscan` using the returned `ImportCardscanID`. Then call `PRC_GetRecognizedContact`.

post.summary: Upload business card image for OCR recognition
post.description: Insert base64 encoded business card image data linked to a previously created `ImportCardscan` record.

get.description: Returns notes (images, SVG sketches, audio) attached to visitor contacts. Filter by ContactID.

post.summary: Create a note for a contact
post.description: Insert a note (image, SVG sketch or audio) linked to an existing contact. Contact must be created first.

put.description: Updates answers for one questionnaire question row. Retrieve the `LineAnswerID` from `LSA_LineAnswerData` first. A contact must exist before questionnaire rows can be updated.

post.summary: Add image to a questionnaire answer
post.description: Insert image data related to a questionnaire answer.

get.summary: Get collected visitor contacts with questionnaire answers
get.description:
Returns all collected visitor contact data including answers to the questionnaire (up to 60 questions). Use `RecordDate` or `ModificationDate` filters for incremental CRM sync. Max 100 rows per request.

**Pagination:** Use `$skiptoken` for next pages.

**Incremental sync example:** `$filter=(RecordDate ge cast('2024-06-01T07:00:00Z','Edm.DateTime'))`

**Note:** ContactID is only unique within one specific Event if not using permanent LeadSuccess licensing.
Returns lead report summaries in PDF format (base64 encoded) per contact, including contact data, questionnaire answers, sketches and photos.

200.description: List of PDF export records with base64 encoded PDF data

get.summary: Get recognized contact data from barcode or business card
get.description: Call this procedure to retrieve updated contact data extracted from a previously inserted barcode or business card image. You must first insert data into `LSA_Contact` AND (`LSA_ImportBarcodeScan` OR `LSA_ImportCardscan` optionally with `LSA_DOC1ImportCardscan`). The procedure waits up to the specified timeout for server-side processing. If no data is returned within timeout, poll `LSA_Contact` later.

parameters.name: p_ContactID
parameters.description: ContactID of the contact to retrieve recognized data for

200.description: Recognized contact data (same structure as single contact GET), or empty if not yet processed within timeout

get.summary: Create and recognize contact from barcode (shortcut)
get.description: Shortcut procedure that creates a new contact and recognizes data from a 1D barcode or extracted barcode ID from a 2D/QR code (e.g. VCARD field X-REFCODE) in a single call. Unlike `PRC_GetRecognizedContact`, you do NOT need to pre-insert `LSA_Contact` and `LSA_ImportBarcodeScan`. Trade-off: you cannot add additional contact data before this procedure returns.

parameters.name: p_EmployeeID
parameters.description: EmployeeID of the contact owner (from LSA_Employee)

parameters.name: p_Request_Barcode
parameters.description: Barcode data or extracted 2D/QR-code text from field X-REFCODE (max 1000 chars)

parameters.name: p_EventID
parameters.description: EventID of the current event (from LSA_LOADEvent)

parameters.name: p_HostName
parameters.description: Unique identifier of your device (internal use to distinguish devices)

parameters.name: p_Incomplete
parameters.description: Set to 1 if contact has not yet been reviewed in back-office

200.description: Recognized contact data, or empty if not processed within timeout (poll LSA_Contact later)

basicAuth.description: HTTPS Basic Authentication. Credentials must be sent with every request.

format.name: $format
format.description: Response format. Use `json` for JSON output; otherwise XML is returned.

skiptoken.name: $skiptoken
skiptoken.description: Primary key value of the last fetched row to retrieve the next page of results (max 100 rows per page). Use the `__next` URL from the previous response.

__next.description: URL to fetch next page. Replace server path prefix as documented.

LOADEventID.description: Primary key / EventID for foreign key references

EmployeeID.description: Primary key, use as FK for user-related references

SentContactCount.description: Number of contacts sent to server

NewNoteCount.description: Number of new messages from info desk

Incomplete.description: 1 if not yet reviewed in back-office

ContactInput.description: Fields for creating or updating a contact. Omit ContactID on insert.

Button.description: 'OCR_TODO' for business card image, 'VCARD_TODO' for 2D/QR code

Barcode2.description: Data content of 2D/QR code (required if Button is VCARD_TODO)

SourceCode.description: Base64 encoded image, audio, or SVG text source

DocFormat.description: Format code (see documentation for lookup table)

ImageDocumentInput.description: Base64 encoded image document (used for profile images, business card scans, questionnaire images)

ContactReport.description: CRM export view with contact data and questionnaire answers

ContactReportID.description: -2 = header row, -1 = group row, >0 = contact data row

message.description: Developer-oriented error description. Save to log file; do not display to end users.

BadRequest.description: 400 Bad Request – Incorrect or missing parameters

NotFound.description: 404 Not Found – No matching record found

InternalServerError.description: 500 Internal Server Error – Server-side problem. Contact a LeadSuccess administrator with the plain text error message.
